description: Duplicate literal keys — last-wins (§59.3). The literal [ "DAL": 3, "DAL": 5 ] has two depth-1 entries whose keys are §45-equal; the later entry overwrites the earlier (last-wins, matching .insert overwrite semantics), and the compiler surfaces the overwrite with W-MAP-DUPLICATE-LITERAL-KEY. Asserts CODE PRESENCE only (no severity assertion): §59.11/§59.8 state Info severity, but impl#1 emits severity 'warning' — a spec-vs-impl severity-label divergence flagged to the PA rather than enshrined.
rationale: §59.3 a map literal with two depth-1 entries whose keys are §45-equal is last-wins; the compiler MAY surface the overwrite with W-MAP-DUPLICATE-LITERAL-KEY.
